honest_issues: The wide suite is not literally green: six sandbox socket failures and one stale pre-existing evidence assertion remain.
Neither GPU training arm was executed; initialization and execution plumbing are tested, but transfer accuracy remains unmeasured.
The CPU smoke and two-frame evaluator fixture are integrity evidence only, not CAL promotion evidence.
Storage-policy audit reported pre-existing missing allowlisted untracked packages; it found zero unknown large tracked or untracked files. Scaffold and dead-code audits passed.
